de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class BoundVarsVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.DefaultVisitor
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.BoundVarsVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor

    public class BoundVarsVisitor
extends DefaultVisitor
    Visitor traversing a term and collecting all variables that occur bound. The visitor implements also a continuation on sequents, traversing all of the formulas occuring in the sequent.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      BoundVarsVisitor()
      creates a Visitor that collects all bound variables for the subterms of the term it is called from.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableSet<QuantifiableVariable> getBoundVariables()
      returns all the bound variables that have been stored
      void visit(Sequent visited)
      visits a sequent
      void visit(Term visited)
      only called by execPostOrder in Term.
